modelNotes.en: Static preview impact statistics sourced from the RITE research package's impact_and_statistics. Every tile carries an as-of date; none are presented as a current live total. The multiplier framing (exchange teachers vs. the wider population of benefiting teachers reached through outbound seminars) is presented as narrative copy around these tiles rather than as a fabricated figure, since the research package provides no verified count of benefiting teachers or students. Spanish translations are model-drafted and unreviewed; see documentation-review.md.
modelNotes.es: Estadisticas de impacto de la vista previa estatica basadas en impact_and_statistics del paquete de investigacion de RITE. Cada tarjeta indica su fecha de referencia; ninguna se presenta como un total actual. El marco del efecto multiplicador se presenta como texto narrativo, no como una cifra inventada. Las traducciones al espanol son generadas por modelo y no revisadas.

sourceNote.en: The 30-year figure is inferred from the 1996 founding date and has not been formally confirmed as an official anniversary by the committee.
sourceNote.es: La cifra de 30 anos es inferida a partir de la fecha de fundacion de 1996 y no ha sido confirmada formalmente por el comite.
